title: The Elders Hunt the Broadcast
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Nusjuro, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Vegapunk, Luffy, Unknown person #9 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Nusjuro
dialogue.text: Don't let him use his sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't maintain distorted future for very long.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How much do you intend to say.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TCH! There are too many lifeforms up here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wake of that ancient conflict scarred the world,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But the aftermath had grander consequences.

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 19 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
